Name: DSA
Description:
Data Systems Analysts, Inc. (DSA) has been providing mission essential solutions for Defense, Federal Government, Academia, and Commercial customers since 1963. DSA's employees excel in helping our customers achieve sensitive, mission-critical business goals and objectives. DSA is a 100 percent employee-owned company: every employee has a stake in the success of our company. Since its inception, DSA has played an important role in supporting the U.S. Government. As one of its first major programs, DSA partnered with the U.S. Department of Defense (DoD) to provide a secure and reliable messaging system for America's fighting forces and our allies. Today, we provide high-end solutions across the Federal customer spectrum, including DoD and Civil agencies. We have expanded our customer base to include Universities and private industry partners as we provide Critical Infrastructure support and monitoring. 

DSA has deep expertise and comprehensive understanding of the operational, security, collaboration, and identity management challenges our customers must address. We are CMMC Level 2 (C3PAO), ISO 9001:2015 and ISO/IEC 27001:2013 registered and appraised at CMMI Maturity Level 3 for Service Projects and for Development. DSA’s service offerings include Systems Engineering and Integration, Software Development, Data Analytics, Cyber Operations and Security, Systems Modernization, Cloud Solutions, Enterprise Collaboration and Knowledge Management, and Critical Infrastructure Intelligence Systems.  DSA is headquartered in Trevose, PA and has major operations in the United States and support over 60 various locations across the country.

Name: Goods And Services Tax Network
Description:
Goods and Service Tax (GST) was the largest indirect tax reform in the history of India. The reform mandated integration of entire nation’s diverse tax portfolio into a single taxation system. This brought upon a massive complexity in developing an IT platform, to handle not only the diverse tax systems of 36 States/Union Territories & Union Government, but also needed providing a single interface for more than a crore taxpayers’ for their GST compliance functions. Goods and Services tax Network (GSTN) was entrusted to build such a platform to service the need of diverse set of stakeholders. The responsibilities include and not limited to the following:
•	GST System Application design, development and operation
•	Taxpayer Migration from erstwhile regime to GST regime
•	IT Infrastructure procurement, commissioning with state-of-an-art Security apparatus
•	Systemic resilience against failures and Disaster Recovery mechanism
•	Helpdesk Setup and Operations
•	Training and Capacity Building
•	GST Eco-System creation and management (GSPs)
•	Backend system for 27 States/UTs for assessments, appeal etc.

Name: ARC by ChargeItSpot
Description:
Managing enterprise devices is complex. ARC by ChargeItSpot simplifies it.

ARC was launched in 2021 by ChargeItSpot, a pioneer in public mobile charging stations trusted by brands like Neiman Marcus, Bloomingdale's, Nordstrom, Target and Under Armour. Built on a decade of kiosk innovation, ARC was developed specifically to address growing demand for secure, efficient, and automated employee device management.

Before ARC, companies often faced costly device loss, hours of manual troubleshooting, and inefficient device tracking. With ARC's intelligent, modular locker system, businesses can now securely store, charge, and monitor handheld devices—all through a centralized self-service kiosk.

ARC's patented hardware and integrated software track each device in real time, alerting managers instantly if devices aren't returned or require maintenance. Organizations using ARC report impressive results, including a 93% reduction in device shrink, managers reclaiming 84% of time previously spent on manual device management, and 75% fewer devices held in overstock.Industry-leading brands like Walmart Canada, Sam’s Club, Lululemon, and DHL rely on ARC to optimize their device management, minimize waste, and increase employee productivity.

Name: JetPatch
Description:
Each year, there is a significant increase in vulnerability discovery.  Unfortunately, the average company takes 71 days to remediate, which is a huge problem when 60% of security breaches result from unpatched vulnerabilities. At the time of breach, most companies have some sort of patch management process.  So what went wrong?

Most processes are focused only on applying the required remediation and fail to address the complexity of the ecosystem, the multiple teams involved, and the ubiquity of existing tools and policies.  This is why JetPatch was created.

JetPatch is an ITOps company offering an innovative server managment platform that focuses on continuous compliance, configuration, and IT process automation. Using advanced automation capabilities, JetPatch enhances business resilience by governing and automating patch and configuration management, while achieving significant operational efficiencies and cost savings. In addition, our agent management solution saves ITOps countless hours of tedious work around deploying, maintaining and troubleshooting server agents.

Name: Aiden Technologies, Inc.
Description:
Keeping Windows computers in a desired state that ensures productivity and good cyber hygiene is a huge challenge. The complexity of modern enterprise environments under siege from hackers drives a continuous need to deploy security updates as threats are discovered and vulnerabilities exposed. Aiden exists to keep endpoints up to date with the speed and accuracy needed to meet this challenge. 

We improve end-user experience by ensuring all computers have exactly the software they’re supposed to have and nothing else.

- We simplify your IT processes: With Aiden’s trusted solution, you can ditch the hassles of maintaining computer images, manually deploying software updates, and rolling out new machines by hyperautomating these time-consuming tasks.

- We save you time (and headaches): Whether responding to help desk tickets or pushing out software updates, IT is like playing a constant game of whack-a-mole. With Aiden, you and your team can spend less time building machines, troubleshooting, deploying, patching, and stressing. Aiden frees you to focus on high-impact, more rewarding projects.

- We support your compliance efforts: Keeping up with compliance frameworks (HIPAA, NIST, CIS, etc.) and performing constant security reviews associated with them is no small feat. AidenBot combined with a plain-English policy document enables your environment to comply with standards and audits.

Name: IDRIS (CNRS)
Description:
L’IDRIS (Institut du Développement et des Ressources en Informatique Scientifique), fondé en novembre 1993, est le centre national du CNRS pour le Calcul Haute Performance (HPC) et l’Intelligence Artificielle (IA), au service des communautés scientifiques de la recherche publique ou privée (sous condition de publication des résultats), tributaires de l'informatique extrême.

À la fois centre de ressources informatiques et pôle de compétences en HPC et IA, l'IDRIS est une unité d'appui et de recherche du CNRS (UAR 851), dépendant de la Direction des Données Ouvertes de la Recherche (DDOR) du CNRS et rattachée administrativement à l’Institut CNRS Sciences Informatiques, mais dont la vocation à l’intérieur du CNRS est pluridisciplinaire. Les modalités de fonctionnement de l’IDRIS sont proches de celles des très grands équipements scientifiques.

L'IDRIS héberge le supercalculateur "Jean Zay", acquis en 2019 par le Ministère de l'Enseignement Supérieur, de la Recherche et de l'Innovation par l'intermédiaire de la société GENCI (Grand Équipement National de Calcul Intensif).

Description:
Eseebase er førende indenfor bygningsdigitalisering, og vi er sat i verden for at gøre bygninger levende med digitale løsninger, der gør det lettere og billigere at håndtere drift og vedligeholdelse. Vores ekspertise i innovative og skræddersyede løsninger, vender vrangen ud på bygninger og får dem til at tale. 

Vi er en sammentømret, global familie med et tæt dagligt samarbejde. Nogen af os arbejder i europa – andre i Asien. Fælles for os alle er, at vi excellerer inden for vores fag, og at vi hver dag løfter i flok for at skabe innovative løsninger for vores kunder. Vi får bygninger til at tale, så vores kunder kan handle.

Tegnestue i Bangladesh
Ved hjælp af DANIDA’s udviklingsprogram for danske virksomheder i udlandet etablerede vi i 2008 en tegnestue i Bangladesh. Tegnestuen er en velfungerende, hurtig og professionelt drevet enhed, som gør det muligt for os at være konkurrencedygtig på prisen uden at gå på kompromis med kvaliteten. På tegnestuen tager vi ofte imod gæster, specielt når danske virksomheder på inspirations-tur og ønsker at se, hvordan vi får det til at fungere.

Vækst og værdiskabelse
Vores væsentligste parameter for succes er, at vores kunder sparer penge, men vi er også stolte af, at vi blev kåret som gazellevirksomhed af Børsen og modtog DI’s initiativpris i 2017. 

eseebase som arbejdsgiver
Vi er en nytænkende og levende organisation, hvor der er et godt arbejdsmiljø, god stemning og ikke langt til træk på smilebåndet. Vi tilbyder vores medarbejder med ind i udviklingen, og sætter stor vægt på at man som medarbejder kan præge sin egen hverdag . Vi er en fleksibel arbejdsplads, med mange både faglige og sociale arrangementer. 

Hvis du vil vide mere om vores ledige stillinger, så følg os her på LinkedIn eller vores website.

eseebase har i dag 150 medarbejdere, som sidder fordelt på kontorer i Danmark, Sverige, Tyskland, Bangladesh og Indien.

Name: Aspire G
Description:
The IT System Operations and Maintenance process involves several key stages to ensure systems run efficiently, remain secure, and provide reliable service. Here’s an overview of the typical workflow:

1. Monitoring and Alerting
Continuous Monitoring: Use monitoring tools (e.g., Nagios, Zabbix) to keep track of system performance, resource utilization, and uptime.
Alerts Setup: Configure alerts for critical thresholds (CPU usage, memory, disk space) to detect issues before they impact users.
2. Incident Management
Incident Detection: Identify incidents through monitoring alerts, user reports, or automated system checks.
Classification and Prioritization: Categorize incidents based on severity and impact on business operations.
Resolution: Investigate and resolve incidents promptly, documenting steps taken for future reference.
3. Change Management
Change Requests: Evaluate and document requests for changes to IT systems (e.g., software updates, configuration changes).
Impact Analysis: Assess the potential impact of changes on existing systems and services.
Approval and Implementation: Obtain necessary approvals and schedule changes during maintenance windows to minimize disruption.
4. Maintenance Tasks
Routine Maintenance: Perform regular tasks such as system updates, patch management, and backups to ensure system integrity and security.
Performance Tuning: Optimize system configurations and resource allocation based on performance data.
5. Backup and Disaster Recovery
Data Backups: Implement and manage regular backup procedures to protect data integrity.
Disaster Recovery Testing: Conduct regular tests of disaster recovery plans to ensure readiness in the event of a system failure.

Name: BroadNet Deutschland GmbH
Description:
Die BROADNET Deutschland GmbH ist ein Spezialist für hochverfügbare und extrem sichere Daten- und Kommunikationsnetze. Als Multi-Transmission-IT-Network verbindet Broadnet leitungsgebundene und drahtlose Technologien, um Standorte schnell und extrem zuverlässig zu vernetzen.

BROADNET betreibt hochverfügbare und sichere Multi-Transmission-IT-Datennetze mit einem deutschlandweiten Backbone, das rund 250 Richtfunk-Hubs verbindet. Die Access-Layer basieren auf Glasfaser-, Richtfunk-, Mobil- und Satellitenfunktechnologien und werden durch ein zentrales SD-WAN-Management technisch wie wirtschaftlich optimiert.

Ergänzend bietet Broadnet deutschlandweit umfassende Infrastruktur-Services für kabellose Nezwerke (Richtfunk, 5G, 5G-Campusnetze, WLAN, LoRa-WAN) mit hochzertifizierten Consultants, Planern und Field-Ingeneers – von der Standortsuche (Site Search) und der Errichtung von Maststandorten über Rollouts und As-a-Service-Modelle bis hin zu definierten SLAs mit 24/7-Support und extrem kurzen Wiederherstellungszeiten.

Ein flächendeckendes Servicenetz mit IT- und Richtfunk-Technikern an 11 Standorten sorgt für Kundennähe und sehr schnelle Reaktionszeiten. Die Servicestandorte befinden sich in Augsburg, Berlin, Frankfurt, Hamburg, Hannover, Köln, Lünen, Leipzig, München, Münster und Stuttgart. Für schnellen Support und eine hohe Ersatzteilverfügbarkeit sind die Standorte Augsburg, Hamburg und Lünen zusätzlich als Lager- und Logistikstandorte ausgebaut.

Abgerundet wird das Portfolio durch leistungsstarke Lösungen wie Richtfunk- und Mobilfunkanbindungen, Front- und Backhaul-Verbindungen per Richtfunk sowie private 5G-Campusnetze.

Name: ScaleCommerce GmbH
Description:
ScaleCommerce betreibt eine hoch performante Plattform-as-a-Service (PaaS), spezialisiert auf Enterprise-Projekte im E-Commerce. 
Heutzutage sind die Varianten, und somit auch die Komplexität für die Architektur eines technischen Setups, enorm vielzählig und aufgrund dessen bietet das technische Konzept unserer PaaS eine enorm hohe Flexibilität. 

Die Plattform unterstützt den redundanten Betrieb von gängigen PHP-Frameworks wie Shopware, OXID eSales, Spryker, Magento und auch Eigenentwicklungen. Neben den PHP-Applikationen betreiben wir ebenso Progressive Web Application (PWA) wie Makaira, Vue Storefront und Co.
Unser 15-köpfiges Team konzentriert sich auf das proaktive Management der Shop-Setups und auch Applikationen wie Makaira selbst. Dabei arbeiten wir stets im engen Austausch mit den Entwicklungs-Teams; nur gemeinsam sind wir erfolgreich.  
Neben der Expertise der Techniker:innen ist das Best Practice Bundle ein weiteres einzigartiges Feature der PaaS und ist für diese Arbeit unerlässlich. Das Bundle steht jedem Setup zur Verfügung und sorgt mit seinen 20 Funktionen in Summe für einen schnellen Shop. Dabei greifen die einzelnen Features sowie auch Services im Setup an unterschiedlichen Stellen. Prominente Beispiele sind Tideways, Cloudflare oder auch das eigenentwickelte Shop-Bild-Management.  

Aktuell vertrauen mehr als 130 Kund:innen sowie über 15 Agenturen auf die Expertise des Teamsund Leistungsstärke der Plattform.

Unter anderem www.armedangels.de, www.depot-online.de, www.zweirad-stadler.de, www.lodenfrey.de, www.trigema.de und viele mehr.

Name: SYRATE
Description:
At SYRATE, we believe the future of safety, security, and retail intelligence lies in Agentic AI Video Analytics. Our mission is to transform raw video streams into actionable intelligence that helps organizations make faster, smarter, and safer decisions.

We build advanced AI-powered video analytics platforms that combine computer vision, vision-language models (VLMs), and agentic AI architectures. Unlike traditional systems that only detect objects, SYRATE’s solutions are designed to understand, reason, and interact with video content in real time.

 What We Do
Public & Urban Safety → crowd monitoring, event detection, license plate recognition, and surveillance analytics.
Industrial Safety → PPE compliance, hazard detection (smoke, fire, intrusions), fall/slip detection, and process safety.
Smart Retail → heatmaps, customer behavior analytics, planogram compliance, and shelf monitoring.

 How We Do It
Vision-Language Models (VLMs) for semantic video search, event summarization, and natural language interaction.
Edge + Cloud Deployment with NVIDIA DeepStream, Jetson AGX, and scalable microservices for real-time performance.
Agentic AI Architecture enabling video agents that can monitor, reason, and trigger workflows automatically.
Integration-first Design so organizations can connect their existing camera networks and data systems seamlessly.

We are driven by a vision of safer cities, smarter industries, and more efficient retail powered by next-generation AI video analytics for Africa .

Name: Agentura komunikačních a informačních systémů AČR
Description:
Bez spojení není velení.

Agentura komunikačních a informačních systémů (AKIS) je podřízeným vojenským zařízením Sekce komunikačních a informačních systémů Ministerstva obrany (SKIS MO) odpovědným za provoz komunikačních a informačních systémů (KIS).

Zodpovídá za implementaci státní informační politiky v rezortu ministerstva obrany. Koordinuje propojení rezortních KIS do aliančních KIS a informačních systémů veřejné správy (datové schránky, registry, elektronický podpis, státní pokladna apod.). Zabezpečuje operační plánování v oblasti KIS včetně způsobů použití KIS v operacích. Zabezpečuje provoz a odbornou přípravu v oblasti KIS ve prospěch pozemních a vzdušných sil, metodicky řídí přípravu specialistů KIS u Velitelství výcviku - Vojenské akademie (VeV-VA) ve Vyškově, Univerzity obrany (UO) v Brně a orgány KIS na jednotlivých stupních velení a řízení.

Odpovídá za implementaci kmitočtové politiky NATO v České republice a za správu úseků rádiového spektra přidělených rezortu Ministerstva obrany v plánu přidělení kmitočtových pásem (národní kmitočtové tabulce) podle zákona č. 127/2005 Sb., o elektronických komunikacích a o změně některých souvisejících zákonů (zákon o elektronických komunikacích).

Odpovídá za rozpracování systému velení a řízení v oblasti KIS, za zabezpečení výstavby míst velení AČR pro ÚU (úkolová uskupení), NRF (NATO Response Force), BG EU (Battle Group EU), ARRC (Allied Rapid Reaction Corps), IZS (Integrovaný záchranný systém), KŘ (krizové řízení) a aliančních míst velení v oblasti KIS, za zabezpečení národní podpory jednotky DCM-B (Deployable Communication Module), za rozvoj a činnost záložních krizových pracovišť chráněných (ZKPCH).

AKIS je provozovatelem neveřejné telekomunikační sítě (v souladu se zákonem č. 127/2005 Sb. a 183/2006 Sb.), vybraných KIS AČR v podřízenosti náčelníka Generálního štábu (NGŠ) AČR.

Name: SI.TE.MAR. SRL | Fire Prevention Systems
Description:
Da oltre quarant’anni progettiamo, installiamo e gestiamo impianti antincendio in ambito navale, industriale e civile, occupandoci dell’intero ciclo operativo: dalla progettazione, fornitura, installazione fino alle manutenzioni successive, di estintori portatili ed impianti fissi di ogni tipologia, sia a terra che a bordo di yacht e navi di ogni genere e grandezza.

Operiamo al fianco di grandi gruppi, PMI e infrastrutture strategiche, offrendo soluzioni su misura che coprono tutte le aree della prevenzione incendi.

La nostra forza risiede nella doppia competenza: interveniamo con la stessa padronanza tecnica sia su impianti terrestri che navali gestendo anche eventuali revamping/refitting.

A questo uniamo un approccio altamente personalizzato e flessibile: ogni progetto è seguito con cura e rapidità, grazie a una filiera decisionale corta e a un team tecnico qualificato che garantisce interventi nel rispetto delle normative vigenti.

Nel corso degli anni abbiamo contribuito alla protezione di asset di prestigio come l’Amerigo Vespucci, svariate Navi: Militari, Capitanerie di Porto, Guardia di Finanza, da crociera e portacontainer, mega-yacht Serene e Ocean Victory, raffinerie, ospedali, scuole e impianti industriali.

I NOSTRI SERVIZI:
- Manutenzione programmata, verifiche ispettive e revamping di impianti esistenti
- Formazione e informazione antincendio per addetti, con prove pratiche e contenuti conformi al D.Lgs. 81/2008
- Fornitura di estintori, DPI, sistemi di rilevazione e spegnimento certificati
- Assistenza tecnica e consulenza per la conformità normativa e la gestione del rischio incendio
- Elaborazioni di SCIA e CPI per l'esercizio delle attività soggette a controllo
- Ricarica bombole con CO2 alimentare o altri gas alimentari appositi per vino e/o birra, oltre che per gasatori domestici.

Siamo presenti su LinkedIn per condividere know-how, rispondere a dubbi frequenti e promuovere una cultura della sicurezza concreta, accessibile e consapevole.

Name: Marat International Ltd
Description:
Know your audience. If you’re writing a business plan for yourself in order to get clarity on your ideas and your industry as a whole, you may not need to include the same level of detail or polish you would with a business plan you want to send to potential investors. Knowing who will read your plan will help you decide how much time to spend on it. 
Know your goals. Understanding the goals of your plan can help you set the right scope. If your goal is to use the plan as a roadmap for growth, you may invest more time in it than if your goal is to understand the competitive landscape of a new industry.
Take it step by step. Writing a 10- to 15-page document can feel daunting, so try to tackle one section at a time. Select a couple of sections you feel most confident writing and start there—you can start on the next few sections once those are complete. Jot down bullet-point notes in each section before you start writing to organize your thoughts and streamline the writing process.

Traditional IT operations struggle with the complexity introduced by rapid, AI-driven development cycles. OpsRabbit addresses this challenge head-on, providing an intelligent, always-on solution that understands and adapts to your infrastructure.

Founded by former BMC Software, Hitachi, Applied AI Consulting  engineers, our team brings decades of experience in enterprise IT solutions. This deep-rooted expertise informs our approach, ensuring that OpsRabbit meets the rigorous demands of modern IT environments.

Join Us:
Embrace the future of IT operations with OpsRabbit. Experience reduced downtime, increased efficiency, and a proactive approach to incident management. ￼Let OpsRabbit help your Ops team shift from reactive to autonomous.

Además, disponemos de un departamento de gestión de mantenimiento de sistemas de control presencial y/o remotamente con acceso TOTAL a los equipos e instalaciones donde se reciben y procesan todos estos datos para generar informes mensuales de revisión de equipos.

Nuestras soluciones ofrecen una colaboración optima de las tecnologías IT y OT, cuya convergencia es clave para la digitalización de equipos, instalaciones y/o procesos. Para ello, es fundamental tener un profundo conocimiento de ambas tecnologías y saber explotar cada una de ellas de forma eficiente.

Name: DATA GUEDA
Description:
Data Gueda est un data center 100% écologique neutre en carbone à impact positif capable de capturer et de valoriser la chaleur fatale des serveurs pour réchauffer des habitations ou des bureaux.
Basé sur la technologie de l'Immersion Cooling, les serveurs seront plongés dans un liquide caloporteur non-inflammable permettant de refroidir les serveurs et de réduire de 50% la consommation d'énergie, de réduire l'espace occupé par les serveurs car rackés verticalement, d'augmenter la longévité des serveurs car protégés de la poussière et de la corrosion, et de réduire la pollution sonore car plus de ventilateurs, et surtout de capturer la chaleur fatale.
Le projet sera basé également sur le modèle en Edge Data Center, sur de petites surfaces avec des modules pré-fabriqués containers maritimes à installer sur un terrain, réduisant les CAPEX puisque pas  de bâtiment, et favorisant les énergies renouvelables.
Entreprise commercialise 3 services:
Le Green Cloud, il s'agit d'un Cloud vertueux, réduisant la consommation d'énergie et permettant aux clients de respecter leurs engagements RSE de leurs infrastructures virtuels.
L'Hébergement : de serveurs immergés de nos clients, au sein de notre data center et valoriser la chaleur produite par les serveurs de nos clients.
Le Clean Hosting: Hébergement vertueux permettant à nos clients de substituer les serveurs classiques en Air Cooling de nos clients par des serveurs en Immersion Cooling en iso- configuration et récupérer la chaleur des serveurs afin d'alimenter en eau chaude les douches ou les cantines au sein des locaux de nos clients.

Koneqt est une initiative dédiée à l'exploration et à l'implémentation de l'automatisation des processus pour les agences créatives et digitales au Maroc.

Les agences marocaines sont des pôles de créativité, mais leur croissance est souvent freinée par des processus manuels et répétitifs. De l'intégration d'un nouveau client (onboarding) à la gestion de projet, ces tâches administratives consomment un temps précieux qui pourrait être consacré à l'innovation et à la stratégie.

 Gagner en efficacité en réduisant les tâches manuelles.
 Améliorer la fiabilité en éliminant les risques d'erreurs.
 Offrir une meilleure expérience client dès le premier jour.

Nosso time é liderado por profissionais com mais de 15 anos de experiência no ecossistema do comércio eletrônico, com passagens por grandes players do mercado e profundo conhecimento em plataformas como Adobe Commerce (Magento), integrações com ERP, marketplaces, meios de pagamento, logística e marketing digital.

Atuamos desde a concepção de novos projetos até a reestruturação e escalada de operações já existentes. Apoiamos desde pequenos negócios que estão dando os primeiros passos no digital até grandes empresas que buscam soluções robustas e integradas.

Serviços oferecidos:

- Suporte e sustentação para Magento Open Source e Adobe Commerce

- Criação e reformulação de lojas virtuais

- Integrações com ERPs, hubs e marketplaces (Mercado Livre, Amazon, etc.)

- Planejamento e implantação de plataformas (Loja Integrada, Shopify, Magento, VTEX)

- Consultoria para times de e-commerce (tecnologia, produto, marketing, atendimento)

- Gestão de catálogo, estruturação de SKUs, estoques e atributos

- Estratégias para mobile commerce e experiência do usuário (UX)

- Acompanhamento técnico no lançamento de produtos físicos e digitais

- Desenvolvimento de aplicativos no-code para validar MVPs

- Suporte tecnológico contínuo para operações em crescimento

Nosso propósito é ajudar empresas a evoluírem com clareza, estratégia e foco em performance. Seja para começar, migrar ou escalar, a BRA e-Commerce é sua parceira para transformar desafios em oportunidades no digital.

Name: Strezniki.net
Description:
Podjetje iSERVER d.o.o. je bilo ustanovljeno leta 2010, z namenom prodaje ugodne in zanesljive IT ter računalniške opreme, hkrati pa nudenju najema naprednih spletnih rešitev, kot so kolokacija, namenski strežniki ter sistemska administracija. V tem času smo pridobili širok krog zadovoljnih kupcev, katerim vedno znova poskušamo zagotoviti boljšo, hitrejšo in še ugodnejšo storitev in produkte.

Spletna trgovina strezniki.net je prva slovenska spletna trgovina namenjena izključno prodaji rabljene in obnovljene in strežniške oziroma IT opreme. Vsi naši produkti so preizkušeni in imajo vključeno najmanj 1 leto garancije, nudimo pa tudi ugodno obročno odplačevanje preko operativnega Grenke Leasinga za pravne in preko Leanpay za fizične osebe.

Vse naše izdelke lahko osebno prevzamete in plačate tudi preko plačilnih kartic Diners, večino tudi na obroke v poslovalnici v Celju oziroma z drugimi plačilnimi karticami kot so Mastercard, Visa in Maestro, podpiramo pa tudi spletno Diners obročno odplačevanje.

V podjetju se poleg prodaje opreme ukvarjamo tudi z načrtovanjem, izvedbo in vzdrževanjem omrežij ter opreme, v letu 2018 pa smo ponudbo razširili tudi z največjo posredniško poslovalnico Telemacha v centru Celja. Naš cilj je celostno povezovanje storitev za manjša in srednja podjetja pod eno streho.

Svoje znanje redno dopolnjujemo in se izobražujemo ter razširjamo ponudbo.

Specjalizujemy się w stronach firmowych i sklepach WooCommerce, które mają realnie wspierać sprzedaż i budowanie marki online. Jeżeli masz już stronę, ale brakuje Ci czasu i spokoju – WPHero przejmuje odpowiedzialność za techniczną stronę Twojego biznesu online.

Wielu klientów podkreśla w opiniach, że współpraca z WPHero to „spokój w głowie”, szybkie rozwiązywanie problemów technicznych i realne wsparcie w rozwoju sklepu. WPHero oferuje zróżnicowane pakiety: Standard, Biznes, e‑commerce i e‑MAX, dopasowane do blogów, stron firmowych oraz rozwijających się sklepów internetowych. Name: CopsGate
Description:
CopsGate is a corporate security and operations management platform designed for enterprises, manufacturing units, warehouses, and large office campuses.

CopsGate digitizes and centralizes security gate pass management, stock movement tracking, and asset management into a single, easy-to-use system. It helps organizations control who enters the premises, what materials move in and out, and how assets are assigned and tracked, ensuring higher security, accountability, and operational efficiency.

The platform replaces manual registers, spreadsheets, and disconnected systems with real-time digital workflows, improving visibility across security, admin, and operations teams. By integrating entry management with inventory and asset control, CopsGate reduces human error, prevents misuse, and enables faster audits and reporting.

CopsGate has been in active use by a corporate customer for over 1.5 years, demonstrating product stability, real-world adoption, and long-term value. The solution is built to scale across multiple locations and is suitable for organizations seeking better compliance, process transparency, and cost control.

Name: Scherer Büroelektronik GmbH
Description:
Die Scherer Büroelektronik GmbH ist seit über vier Jahrzehnten ein verlässlicher Partner für moderne Bürokommunikation und fest in der Region Saarland verwurzelt. Mit unserem Standort in Völklingen und einem Team von rund 30 engagierten Mitarbeitern haben wir uns als führender Anbieter von Druck- und Kopiersystemen sowie maßgeschneiderten Lösungen etabliert.

Wir sind stolz darauf, ein echtes Stück Saarland zu repräsentieren – bodenständig, verlässlich und stets nah am Kunden. Bei uns erwarten Sie nicht nur spannende berufliche Herausforderungen, sondern auch ein familiäres Arbeitsumfeld, in dem Zusammenhalt und Teamgeist eine zentrale Rolle spielen. Wir suchen Menschen aus der Region, die gemeinsam mit uns wachsen und die Zukunft der Bürokommunikation im Saarland aktiv mitgestalten möchten. Wenn Sie in einem dynamischen, regional verwurzelten Unternehmen mit flachen Hierarchien und kurzen Entscheidungswegen arbeiten möchten, sind Sie bei uns genau richtig.

Kommen Sie zu uns und werden Sie Teil eines Teams, das regionale Stärke mit innovativen Lösungen verbindet!

Was uns auszeichnet, sind unsere dynamischen Strukturen und flachen Hierarchien, die kurze Entscheidungswege ermöglichen und zahlreiche Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten bieten. Bei uns haben Sie die Freiheit, sich selbst zu entfalten und viele Entscheidungen eigenständig zu treffen. Wir legen großen Wert auf die Zufriedenheit unserer Mitarbeiter, was sich in einem fairen und leistungsgerechten Gehalt sowie einem ausgewogenen Verhältnis zwischen Arbeit und Freizeit widerspiegelt.

Unsere Unternehmenskultur ist geprägt von einem familiären, dynamischen und teamorientierten Miteinander. Vertrauen in unsere Mitarbeiter ist uns wichtig, weshalb wir auf ständige Kontrolle verzichten und stattdessen auf Eigenverantwortung und Handlungsfreiheit setzen. Jede Idee wird bei uns wertgeschätzt, und Probleme können jederzeit offen angesprochen werden – auch bei persönlichen Angelegenheiten erhalten Sie Unterstützung.

Name: BotanicWall
Description:
Botanic Wall offering innovative, nature-based solution for dynamic, human-centric indoor and outdoor urban design. 

Botanic Wall is a pre patentented revolutionary system for vertical gardens smart management. 

This solution brings nature and technology together to create healthier, more inspiring urban environments. 

In a world where urban air in the is more polluted than ever, and well-being at the cities is more critical than ever, Botanic Wall offers a solution that is both sustainable and intelligent. 

Developed by Botanic Technology team, this smart system managed remotely vertical gardens, monitors, analyzes, and improves environmental quality using AI-driven data analysis and real-time sensor technology. Our integrated platform tracks key indicators such as CO2 emissions, air humidity, temperature, fine dust levels, harmful organic compounds, and even electricity and water consumption of garden maintenance system. 

Botanic wall is not only revolutionary solution for landscaping companies which reduce finance and time for maintenance service. The product helps to building investors, facility companies and tenants report critical environmental quality indicators in line with international standards such as LEED, BREEAM, and WELL. The system can generate and analyze data essential for companies' ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) reporting, supporting sustainability goals and compliance efforts. 

It’s not just a green walls smart system —it’s a vision of the sustainable, data-driven, smart urban spaces of tomorrow. 

Let’s grow the future together.

Cloud infrastructure design and management (AWS, OpenStack, Proxmox)

Infrastructure as Code using Terraform and Ansible

Monitoring and IT security (Zabbix, Greenbone, firewalls)

With a strong background in system engineering, Cephra Integration offers professional services rooted in hands-on experience and industry best practices. Zajmujemy się kompleksową obsługą informatyczną – od projektowania i wdrażania sieci komputerowych, przez konfigurację i utrzymanie serwerów, aż po codzienne wsparcie użytkowników i szybkie reagowanie na zgłoszenia. Oferujemy zdalną i lokalną pomoc, dostosowaną do potrzeb każdego klienta.

To sprawia, że współpraca z nami jest wygodna, a cała infrastruktura firmy może być zarządzana przez jednego, zaufanego partnera.

Naszym celem jest wdrażanie rozwiązań, które są stabilne, skalowalne i dopasowane do rzeczywistych potrzeb biznesu. Budujemy długofalowe relacje oparte na zaufaniu i profesjonalnym doradztwie, pomagając firmom rozwijać się w cyfrowym świecie.

Name: epnox GmbH
Description:
Willkommen bei epnox – Ihrem zuverlässigen Partner für IT- und Cloud-Dienstleistungen!

Als langjähriger Experte begleiten wir Aufsteiger und mittelständische Unternehmen auf ihrem Weg in die digitale Zukunft. Dabei legen wir besonderen Wert auf individuelle Zielorientierung und schaffen maßgeschneiderte Lösungen für Unternehmen jeder Größe.

Mit über 15 Jahren Erfahrung können wir mit Stolz auf über 1.000 zufriedene Firmenkunden verweisen. Unser Hauptsitz in Vreden ist der Ausgangspunkt für ein engagiertes Team von 60 Mitarbeitenden, das Unternehmen aus verschiedenen Branchen betreut, darunter Arztpraxen, öffentliche Einrichtungen, Schulen und Institutionen.

Unsere Leidenschaft gilt einer vertrauensvollen Partnerschaft mit unseren Kunden. Wir bieten nicht nur Sicherheit, Skalierbarkeit, Flexibilität und Leistung durch unsere redundant aufgebauten Rechenzentren an zwei Standorten,

sondern stehen auch für eine zuverlässige, umfassende Betreuung aus einer Hand. Die Ringstrukturen zwischen unseren Rechenzentren sichern uns gegenseitig gegen Ausfälle und Störungen ab, und unsere mindestens zwei getrennten eigenen Backbones leiten Daten nach Frankfurt, Amsterdam, Düsseldorf und Hamburg.

Um dieses Engagement zu unterstreichen, hat epnox ein umfassendes und transparentes Datenschutz- und Sicherheitsprogramm implementiert. Dazu gehört ein nach ISO 27001 zertifiziertes Informationsmanagement sowie eine EU-DSGVO-konforme Auftragsdatenverarbeitung.

Bei epnox sind wir stolz darauf, Experten für IT und Cloud zu sein und stehen Ihnen in allen Belangen zur Verfügung. Entdecken Sie, wie wir Ihr Unternehmen sicher und erfolgreich in die digitale Zukunft begleiten können. Ihr Erfolg ist unser Antrieb!

Kontaktieren Sie uns für weitere Informationen oder vereinbaren Sie ein persönliches Gespräch. Wir freuen uns darauf, Sie kennenzulernen und Ihnen dabei zu helfen, das Beste aus Ihrer digitalen Transformation zu machen. 

Bereichern Sie unser Team – Ihre Karriere bei epnox.

Description:

Implantação, implementação e revitalização de sistemas de gestão

Atuando a mais de 15 anos com os produtos TOTVS, a maior empresa de software de gestão empresarial do Brasil, a VMS oferece uma continua melhoria de processos empresariais, engajados a um ERP autogerenciável, inovador e ágil. Implantação de novos sistemas: a VMS conta com uma equipe de profissionais altamente qualificados para realizar a implantação dos sistemas TOTVS de forma rápida e eficiente.

Implementação de novos módulos: a VMS ajuda seus parceiros a implementar novos módulos nos sistemas TOTVS, de acordo com as suas necessidades específicas.

Revitalização de sistemas antigos: a VMS ajuda as empresas a modernizar seus sistemas ERP com processos antigos e engessados, para que eles estejam alinhados às melhores práticas de mercado.

Nossos diferenciais

A VMS se diferencia por oferecer serviços de alta qualidade, com foco na satisfação dos clientes. A empresa conta com uma equipe de profissionais experientes e qualificados, que estão sempre atualizados com as últimas tendências do mercado.

Σήμερα διαθέτει ιδιόκτητες εγκαταστάσεις στην Νέα Φιλαδέλφεια, όπου είναι συγκεντρωμένες όλες οι δραστηριότητες και το προσωπικό της. Σκοπός της εταιρείας είναι η παροχή εξειδικευμένων & αξιόπιστων λύσεων στο κομμάτι των μηχανών και τεχνολογιών γραφείου και το service. Στόχος είναι η υψηλού επιπέδου παροχή των υπηρεσιών της εταιρείας τόσο σε μεγάλες επιχειρήσεις όσο και στο δημόσιο τομέα και την αυτοδιοίκηση. Σχεδόν 40 χρόνια η Καλαπόδης ΑΒΕΕ βρίσκεται δίπλα στους πελάτες της με απώτερο σκοπό της, την ικανοποίηση των αναγκών τους καθώς και την εύρεση της βέλτιστης λύσης σε όλες τους τις ανάγκες. Μέσα από το εξειδικευμένο και καταρτισμένο προσωπικό της, το οποίο είναι άρτια εκπαιδευμένο, ανταποκρίνεται άμεσα ακόμα και στις πιο απαιτητικές ανάγκες του ευρύτερου δημοσίου τομέα και των επιχειρήσεων. Οι υπηρεσίες που διαθέτει η εταιρεία καλύπτουν ένα ευρύ φάσμα επιλογών και συνεχώς εξελίσσονται με βάση την ικανοποίηση των απαιτήσεων που προκύπτουν από τις ανάγκες των πελατών της. Για εμάς σημασία έχει η ουσιαστική και ολοκληρωμένη λύση προς τον πελάτη αναδεικνύοντας μας και βασιζόμενοι στις αξίες που μας διέπουν.

• On‑demand local support coordinated with remote teams
• Multi‑location operational support, defined in collaboration with partners

If you are exploring ways to strengthen your local operational presence in APJ/APAC, we’d be pleased to have a quiet, exploratory conversation.

Name: Update Heroes
Description:
Why regular WordPress maintenance is essential?
The maintenance of a WordPress website plays a central role in ensuring its security, stability and performance in the long term. In view of the increasing threats posed by cyber attacks and the constant further development of plugins and themes, continuous maintenance is essential. Below we show why regular WordPress maintenance is crucial and how it helps to strengthen your online presence.

What does WordPress maintenance mean?
The maintenance of a WordPress website includes all the essential steps to keep the platform up-to-date and secure. This includes regularly updating plugins and themes, ensuring optimal loading speeds and implementing security measures and backups. All of these measures help to ensure that your website runs smoothly and securely at all times.

Important reasons for continuous WordPress maintenance
Protection against hacker attacks and malware
Increase in loading speed and performance
Ensuring compatibility and avoiding technical problems

Name: DataESG
Description:
A Data ESG é uma empresa especializada em transformar dados ambientais, sociais e de governança em inteligência estratégica para negócios sustentáveis. Nosso propósito é ajudar organizações a integrar sustentabilidade, inovação e performance — de forma mensurável, comparável e alinhada aos principais padrões globais (IFRS S1/S2, GRI, SASB, entre outros).

Unimos tecnologia e metodologia para que os dados ESG deixem de ser apenas obrigação regulatória e passem a ser ferramenta de decisão, reputação e competitividade. Por meio de plataformas integradas, dashboards personalizados e relatórios inteligentes, oferecemos soluções completas para coleta, gestão e comunicação de indicadores ESG.

Nosso diferencial está na abordagem data-first: utilizamos a força da análise de dados para gerar insights que impulsionam governança, transparência e impacto positivo. Atuamos lado a lado com nossos clientes — compreendendo seus desafios, maturidade e contexto setorial — para desenhar jornadas ESG personalizadas e consistentes.

 O que fazemos:
• Estruturação e integração de dados ESG
• Desenvolvimento de relatórios e dashboards interativos
• Alinhamento a normas e frameworks internacionais (GRI, SASB, IFRS S1/S2)
• Gestão de riscos e oportunidades socioambientais
• Comunicação de sustentabilidade e engajamento de stakeholders

Acreditamos que o futuro dos negócios será definido pela capacidade de medir, gerir e comunicar impactos de forma transparente. Por isso, a Data ESG apoia empresas que desejam liderar a transição para uma economia de baixo carbono, inclusiva e orientada a resultados.

 Data ESG — conectando dados, pessoas e propósito para construir negócios mais sustentáveis.

Name: hm info
Description:
nous proposons désormais un service de réparation par correspondance pour vos ordinateurs. Si votre ordinateur nécessite des réparations, il vous suffit de nous l'envoyer et nous nous occuperons du reste.
Une fois que nous recevrons votre ordinateur, notre équipe technique effectuera un diagnostic complet pour déterminer la nature du problème. Sur la base de ce diagnostic, nous élaborerons un devis détaillé qui vous sera envoyé par e-mail. Le devis comprendra une description claire des réparations nécessaires, ainsi que le coût associé à chaque élément.
Nous tenons à souligner que nous accordons une grande importance à la transparence et à la satisfaction de nos clients. Ainsi, nous ne procéderons à aucune réparation sans votre approbation préalable du devis. Une fois que vous aurez approuvé le devis, nous nous efforcerons de réparer votre ordinateur dans les meilleurs délais.
Lorsque la réparation sera terminée, nous vous renverrons votre ordinateur par le biais d'un service de livraison sécurisé. Nous veillerons à emballer soigneusement votre appareil pour qu'il arrive en parfait état.
Si vous souhaitez profiter de notre service de réparation par correspondance, veuillez nous contacter par téléphone ou par e-mail. Notre équipe se fera un plaisir de répondre à toutes vos questions et de vous guider à travers le processus d'envoi.
Nous sommes impatients de vous offrir une solution pratique et fiable pour la réparation de votre ordinateur

Name: 에어키(AirQuay) - AI 기반 IT 인프라 솔루션 전문 기업
Description:
주식회사 에어키는 무선 통합 네트워킹 솔루션 전문 기업으로 2002년 설립되었다. 
설립 초기 국내 무선랜 시장의 선두 주자로 자리매김했으며, 지난 20년간 무선 네트워크 설계, 구축 및 통합, 지보수 서비스 영역으로 사업을 확장하며 대기업, 통신사업자, 금융, 교육, 공공, 통, 헬스케어 부문 고객에게 고부가가치의 제품과 서비스를 공급해왔다. 
시스코를 비롯한 주요 글로벌 기업들과의 파트너십을 통해 무선 네트워크, 데이터센터, 보안 및 클라우드 솔루션을 제공해왔으며, 축적된 역량과 경험을 바탕으로 실시간위치추적(RTLS) 및 IoT 기반의 지능형공간(SmartSpace) 솔루션을 개발, 공급하고 있다. 
2021년 매출은 170억원이며, 서울시 서초구에 본사에 본사를 두고 약80명의 직원이 근무하고 있다. 에어키는 중소벤처기업부장관 표창을 받았으며, 고용노동부 선정 청년친화 강소기업, 이노비즈협회 선정 기술혁신형 중소기업 표창을 수상했다. 또한, 주 4.5일 근무제 도입, 탄력 및 연근무제 활성화를 통해 업무 효율성을 높이고 자율적 기업 문화를 선도하고 있다.
계열사로는 인공지능(AI) 기술을 기반으로 환경, 농업 및 신재생 에너지 분야를 위한 지능 정보화 솔루션을 개발하는 디지키(DigiQuay)와 베트남 법인 에어키 비나(AirQuay VINA)가 있다.

우리에프아이에스는 지난 2001년 설립 이후,국내 최고의 금융 IT 전문지식을 밑거름 삼아 우리금융의 IT 경쟁력을 강화하고 특히 IT 아소싱 체계, IT 인프라 통합운영 체계 등 선진화된 IT 서비스 관리체계 는 다른 IT 회사의 벤치마킹 대상이 되고 있습니다.

Name: SecuSign.app
Description:
SecuSign is a fast, lightweight, and privacy-focused e-signature platform for teams that need signatures now — not tomorrow.




We help companies send, sign, and close documents in minutes with a built-in audit trail for every signature. No printing. No chasing. No drama.




What we do
• Digital Signatures: Send contracts, POs, NDAs, HR forms, and approvals to one or multiple recipients. Everyone signs online from any device.
• Real-Time Status Tracking: See who viewed, who signed, and who’s still pending — live.
• Secure Evidence Bundle: When all parties are done, every signer automatically receives the fully signed PDF plus a tamper-evident activity log (timestamps, signer identity, actions).
• Revision Control: Need to edit after sending? Issue a new revision with one click. Old links are instantly invalid so there’s no version confusion.
• Zero-Export Mode for Sensitive Docs: Our workflow is designed to keep documents controlled and traceable, instead of being passed around in email chains.
• No Account Required for Signers: Your clients and partners can review and sign without creating an account or learning new software.




Why teams choose SecuSign
• Speed: Close deals faster. Signatures in minutes, audit trail included.
• Simplicity: Clean interface. No bloat. No training required.
• Compliance Mindset: Every envelope comes with a full evidence log for internal records, audits, or dispute protection.
• Ownership: You control the document, the signers, and the record. We make it easy to prove who signed what and when.




Our mission
Make signing simple, traceable, and trustworthy — so small and mid-size businesses can work at the speed of big companies, without paying enterprise software prices.

IT outsourcing – kompletní správa firemního IT, monitoring, optimalizace a rychlá reakce na problémy

Správa serverů – stabilní provoz, zálohování, správa přístupů a obnova dat

CCTV kamerové systémy (Hikvision) – instalace a konfigurace pro dohled a prevenci

Komplexní distribuce HW a SW – velkoobchodní ceny, odborný výběr, předkonfigurace a instalace

Pro jednotlivce a firmy zajišťujeme rychlý servis elektroniky – od mobilů a tabletů přes počítače a notebooky až po tiskárny, herní konzole a další zařízení. Opravy provádíme často na počkání, s použitím kvalitních dílů a profesionálního vybavení.

Ve FIXERS věříme, že technologie mají sloužit vám – ne vy jim. Proto jsme partnerem, na kterého se můžete spolehnout, ať už potřebujete jednorázový zásah nebo dlouhodobou spolupráci.

Name: ClarityOps
Description:
ClarityOps es el partner técnico para pymes y profesionales que dependen de la tecnología, pero no quieren vivir pendientes de ella.

Mantenemos y desarrollamos la base digital que sostiene tu negocio:
infraestructura web, automatizaciones, integraciones y soporte continuo.
Entramos cuando los sistemas empiezan a fallar, los procesos se vuelven lentos o el desorden técnico frena el avance.

Qué hacemos
1. Operaciones y mantenimiento: actualizaciones seguras, copias verificadas, seguridad y monitorización continua.
2. Desarrollo y producto: webs, tiendas y MVPs ligeros, diseñados para convertir y evolucionar sin fricción.
3. Datos y automatización: conexión de fuentes, dashboards claros y flujos automáticos que ahorran tiempo y errores.
4. Dirección tecnológica a demanda: decisiones técnicas con sentido, sin nómina ni improvisación.

Cómo trabajamos
Método en 4 pasos: diagnóstico → plan → ejecución → medición. Cada cambio se documenta, se mide su impacto (uptime, velocidad, errores, KPIs) y se reporta con claridad. Sin jerga. Sin humo. Sin dependencia.

Nuestra misión
Aportar tranquilidad operativa a las pymes mediante operaciones responsables, procesos claros y respuestas a tiempo. Claridad, continuidad y confianza: los tres pilares de cada proyecto.

 Agenda una llamada: https://clarityops.es/agendar-llamada

Disaster recovery is the proactive and strategic approach to mitigating the impact of unforeseen events or catastrophic incidents on an organization’s operations, infrastructure, and data integrity.

It encompasses a set of policies, procedures, and technologies designed to swiftly restore essential functions and services in the aftermath of a disruptive event, such as natural disasters, cyberattacks, equipment failures, or human error.

The primary goal of disaster recovery is to minimize downtime, data loss, and financial losses, enabling businesses to recover quickly and resume normal operations with minimal disruption to customers, employees, and stakeholders.

## **Quem Somos**

 **Sistemas de Segurança Eletrônica** – Instalação e configuração de CFTV, controle de acesso e alarmes.  
 **Automação e Monitoramento** – Soluções inteligentes para proteção e controle remoto de ambientes.  
 **Consultoria em Tecnologia** – Análise e desenvolvimento de estratégias para otimização dos sistemas tecnológicos.  

## **Nossa Missão**

Dlaczego warto nam zaufać?
 Doświadczenie i profesjonalizm – Nasz zespół składa się z ekspertów, którzy znają najnowsze technologie i rozwiązania IT.

 Indywidualne podejście – Nie stosujemy uniwersalnych rozwiązań – każda współpraca jest dopasowana do specyfiki klienta.
 Reagujemy szybko i skutecznie – Wsparcie IT powinno być zawsze dostępne wtedy, gdy tego potrzebujesz.

Dla kogo jesteśmy?
 Firmy – które potrzebują kompleksowego wsparcia IT, outsourcingu lub optymalizacji infrastruktury.
 Klienci indywidualni – którzy szukają niezawodnej pomocy w rozwiązaniu problemów ze sprzętem i oprogramowaniem.

SysTech – bo IT ma działać bez kompromisów. Skontaktuj się z nami i sprawdź, jak możemy pomóc Tobie i Twojej firmie!

Name: signalX
Description:
SignalX is a powerful, flexible, and user-friendly data transfer tool revolutionizing how industrial organizations manage and integrate data. It easily pulls data from various industrial sources and integrates seamlessly with systems like Snowflake, AVEVA PI, Databricks, and Canary. With an intuitive point-and-click interface, SignalX eliminates the need for custom coding, making it accessible even to users without technical expertise.
SignalX excels in integrating industrial process data, offering real-time visibility and enhanced operational control. This enables organizations to transfer, manage, and analyze data effectively, driving smarter decisions and operational efficiency.
A key feature of SignalX is its vast array of connectors, allowing integration with diverse data sources and platforms. Whether connecting cloud-based systems, legacy infrastructure, industrial equipment, or IoT devices, SignalX ensures smooth data flow across all environments. Its extensive connector library simplifies data integration, regardless of system type or compatibility challenges.
SignalX also offers auto-scaling capabilities that adjust to growing data demands, maintaining consistent performance as data volumes and system requirements increase. Additionally, SignalX enhances functionality with the ability to proxy across networks, ensuring smooth communication across different systems or network boundaries. It can also transform and filter data, modifying or refining information as it’s transferred. Finally, SignalX can act as an MQTT broker, facilitating seamless communication between IoT devices. 
More than just a tool, SignalX is a comprehensive solution that empowers businesses to access, integrate, and manage data with minimal effort. As companies rely more on data for innovation and productivity, SignalX stands out as a scalable, reliable, and easy-to-use asset for any industrial data ecosystem.

We observe the rapid development of technology and telecommunications, so we believe it is crucial to undergo a business transformation for sustainability and growth. Furthermore, we notice that the potential and opportunities in the field of technology and telecommunications infrastructure are wide open. This is particularly significant in the current era, as people heavily rely on telecommunications, technology, and access to information, making these essential needs.

The name 'Mahakam' represents the largest and longest river that runs through 'East Kalimantan,' providing livelihoods and benefits to the majority of its people. The river originates in 'Mahakam Ulu' district and flows to the mouth of the 'Meriam' river in the 'Kutai Kartanegara' district. In addition to this, it divides the capital of 'East Kalimantan' province into two parts: 'Samarinda Seberang' and 'Samarinda Kota'.

Name: Climora
Description:
Climora is a compliance-native SaaS platform that helps real estate owners, developers, and municipalities optimize building performance, reduce energy waste, and meet ESG regulations in real time.

We connect directly to a building’s engineering infrastructure (HVAC, lighting, metering systems) using open protocols like KNX, BACnet, Zigbee, and Modbus. Through our proprietary AI module and telemetry engine, Climora enables:

• Live tracking of comfort and energy indicators (CO₂, temperature, humidity, consumption)
• Automated ESG reporting for LEED, BREEAM, WELL, EU Taxonomy, and Spanish CTE
• Scenario-based optimization with our “Comfort vs Energy” algorithm
• Partner-ready deployments via white-label integrations for engineering firms and public-sector vendors

Whether you manage commercial campuses, residential complexes, or public infrastructure, Climora transforms regulatory complexity into operational clarity — helping you lead with sustainability, not bureaucracy.

 White-label friendly | API-ready | Scalable across legacy and smart systems

Entre os recursos do sistema estão: cadastro e controle de ativos, gestão de obras e reformas, acompanhamento de garantias, inspeções prediais, medições, ocorrências, inventário, ferramentas e muito mais.

Nosso propósito é simplificar processos, reduzir falhas operacionais e garantir rastreabilidade total das informações, contribuindo para decisões mais assertivas e para a valorização do patrimônio. Entregamos uma solução moderna, prática e em constante evolução, construída para atender às necessidades reais do mercado de manutenção predial.

Estamos comprometidos em transformar a gestão predial por meio da tecnologia.

Name: Fast Maintenance Software
Description:
Web based maintenance management software has a built a robust maintenance management software with feature-rich tools for the Manufacturing, Construction, Healthcare industries, among others. To maximize performance, maintenance management software focuses on equipment records as their foundation. Equipment records anchor most maintenance tasks and activities. You need to capture different types of information about your assets along with how they are used, where they are located and whether they are in service. Fast access to equipment information directly impacts your ability to provide effective maintenance.
This reduces the potential for introducing equipment failures while performing maintenance and saves time searching for the proper information. Another benefit of maintenance tracking is to get more accurate mean-time-between-failure data.Planned maintenance system helps managers have a better idea of the profitability of their assets and determine whether they are reaching their estimated lifespan. 
The Fast Maintenance Management Software provides users with a set of tools needed to track and improve equipment performance in the factory. The system manages both scheduled and unscheduled equipment maintenance activities. Equipment Maintenance helps companies monitor and improve OEE(Overall Equipment Effectiveness), thereby increasing their ROI while decreasing operational costs.

Name: Afaq Sharq Awsat
Description:
آفاق الشرق الأوسط

منذ عام 2006، تواصل شركة آفاق الشرق الأوسط تقديم حلول متكاملة في مجال المعدات المكتبية والمصرفية والحلول البرمجية والأنظمة المخصصة. نحن نخدم الشركات، المصارف، وشركات الصيرفة في جميع أنحاء العراق، مع التركيز على تقديم أعلى معايير الجودة والموثوقية.

نحن متخصصون في تجارة الأجهزة الأساسية مثل عدادات النقود، الأجهزة المصرفية، الطابعات، الكاشيرات، وأجهزة نقاط البيع (POS)، مع توفير خدمات الصيانة والدعم الفني لهذه الأجهزة، إلى جانب تطوير وتنفيذ الأنظمة البرمجية المصممة خصيصًا لتلبية احتياجات العملاء.

رسالتنا هي تمكين المؤسسات من خلال تزويدها بمعدات متطورة، وحلول برمجية متكاملة، وخدمات استثنائية لضمان عمليات سلسة وزيادة الإنتاجية.

خدماتنا تشمل:
	•	توريد وتركيب المعدات المكتبية والمصرفية.
	•	تطوير الحلول البرمجية والأنظمة المخصصة.
	•	خدمات صيانة ودعم فني لعدادات النقود، وأجهزة نقاط البيع (POS)، والكاشيرات.
	•	استشارات لتقديم حلول متكاملة تناسب احتياجات العملاء.

برؤية طموحة منذ 2006، تسعى آفاق الشرق الأوسط لأن تظل شريكًا يمكن للشركات، المصارف، وشركات الصيرفة الاعتماد عليه لتحقيق الكفاءة والنمو.

At Nuvoxel, we empower cloud users with intelligent, AI-driven tools to simplify and enhance cloud management. Our mission is to transform the way businesses interact with their cloud environments, ensuring efficiency, security, and cost-effectiveness at every step.

In an era marked by the rapid expansion of AI and cloud resources, maintaining clarity and control over your cloud infrastructure can be challenging. Nuvoxel addresses these challenges head-on with our comprehensive suite of AI-powered solutions. We specialize in Cloud Taxonomy, ensuring your resources are organized logically and consistently across your environment. Our advanced Resource Tagging and Identification tools help you track and categorize resources effortlessly, enabling better management and reporting.

Maintaining clean and consistent tags is crucial, and Nuvoxel’s Tag Management and Hygiene tools make this process seamless. We help you enforce tagging policies, clean up inconsistent tags, and ensure that your cloud environment remains organized. Our tools also extend to managing Resource Group and Subscription Hierarchies, ensuring that your resources are properly grouped and structured for optimal governance and oversight.

Security is a top priority, and our Resource Access Permissions tools help you control and monitor who has access to what, ensuring that your cloud environment is secure and compliant with your organization’s policies. Additionally, our orphaned resource identification feature helps you find and eliminate unused or forgotten resources, reducing waste and optimizing costs.

At Nuvoxel, we believe in making cloud management easier, smarter, and more efficient for everyone. Whether you’re a small business or a large enterprise, our tools are designed to help you take full control of your cloud environment, so you can focus on what truly matters—growing your business.

Name: MILEBIT
Description:
Milebit is an AI-powered routing and driver community app built specifically for truck drivers in the United States.

Planning a truck route is more than just getting from point A to point B. Fuel prices, toll roads, traffic, weather, parking availability, and real-world road conditions all affect your time, costs, and profit. Milebit brings all of this together in one place and helps drivers make smarter decisions on the road.

Using AI, Milebit analyzes routes to help drivers:

Save fuel

Reduce toll costs

Avoid unnecessary delays

Choose truck-friendly roads

React quickly to changing conditions

Instead of switching between multiple apps, Milebit provides a single, clear view of the road ahead and suggests optimized routes designed for real trucking, not passenger cars.

Milebit is also more than just navigation. It includes a driver community, allowing truck drivers to stay connected, share insights, and support each other while on the road. Whether it’s route tips, road conditions, or simple communication, Milebit helps drivers feel less alone behind the wheel.

Built for owner-operators and fleet drivers, Milebit focuses on efficiency, simplicity, and real savings. No clutter, no unnecessary features, just tools that help turn every mile into smarter driving and better profit.

Drive smarter. Save more. Stay connected.

Name: Počítačová společnost, s.r.o.
Description:
Vznikli jsme v čase, kdy počítače byly spíše lepší kalkulačky a člověk, který jim rozuměl, byl většinou považován za šamana či kouzelníka... psal se rok 1994.
Za ten čas jsme ušli ohromný kus cesty, kde jsme nasbírali spousty zkušeností, které Vám nyní můžeme nabídnout. Poznali jsme zákazníky z řad domácností, živnostníků, firem i veřejné správy. Dlouholetá praxe a zkušenosti nás naučili pracovat s každým podle jeho potřeb, přání a dané situace. Zkrátka kompletní servis takový, který opravdu potřebujete!
Našim hlavním cílem je nepracovat jako externí firma, ale být Vaší součástí, jeden kontakt pro vše, od počítačů a docházek až po kamerové a zabezpečovací systémy.
